positive: A stylized, modern, minimalist depiction of a celestial cityscape. The main subject is a graceful silhouette of a stylized crescent moon cradling a constellation map that subtly forms the shape of an abstract animal (like a fox or deer). The city elements are geometric and stacked, made of luminous, stylized skyscrapers that transition from deep indigo to sapphire blue. Include twinkling, soft golden stardust connecting the celestial elements. The overall style should be clean, highly contrasting linework, reminiscent of Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints mixed with Art Deco futurism. Composition should be perfectly centered, suitable for a t-shirt print. Lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, emphasizing clean edges and strong silhouettes. Color palette: deep indigos, sapphire blues, gold metallic accents, and black negative space.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, distorted, messy, gradient, photorealistic, signature, logos, copyrighted
